company_type: Technology Platform - Mobility, Delivery, and Logistics Services

dependencies: Third-party payment service providers for payment processing
Third-party cloud computing services and co-located data centers
Independent Drivers, Couriers, and Carriers as platform participants
Background check service providers for Driver qualification
risks: Reliance on limited number of ridesharing insurance providers
Single background-check provider in certain jurisdictions
Reliance on Google Maps with no alternative global mapping solution
Dependence on third-party cloud services (AWS, Google Cloud)
Merchant concentration risk in Delivery business

regulatory_risks: Driver classification as employees vs independent contractors (AB5 in California, Proposition 22)
Transportation Network Company (TNC) regulations and licensing requirements
Background check and Driver qualification requirements varying by jurisdiction
GDPR and data privacy regulations in EU
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA)
India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act
Payment services regulations (electronic money institution licensing in EU, UK, Mexico)
Strong Customer Authentication (SCA) requirements in EU, UK, Mexico
Money transmission and online payment regulations
Anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing regulations
Competition and antitrust laws (EU, US, Brazil, India)
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) compliance
Autonomous vehicle regulations
Climate-related regulations (California zero emission vehicle requirements by 2030)
Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive in EU
VAT and sales tax regulations (UK VAT Order 1987 dispute)
Employment and labor laws (minimum wage, workers' compensation)
Social security contribution requirements (Switzerland, Brazil)
Unemployment insurance regulations (New Jersey, California)
Ridesharing bans or restrictions in certain jurisdictions (Argentina, Germany, Italy, Japan, South Korea, Spain)
Airport operating licenses and regulations
Delivery network fee caps and surge pricing caps
Food delivery platform employment regulations (Spain)
Mexico Federal Labor Law amendments reclassifying mobility and delivery workers

sanction_risks: Economic sanctions on countries where operations exist
Middle East conflicts affecting business operations
Foreign investment restrictions in certain jurisdictions
